🎉 Create a Board

Connect Recognition With the Tools Your Team Already Uses

WorkKudo integrates into your existing workplace ecosystem so recognition happens where employees already work — no additional apps to learn or platforms to switch between.

Explore IntegrationsSee How It Works
WorkKudo — Connections
📝
Notion IntegrationKeep recognition visible in Notion
📧
Email DeliveryReach any inbox, no account needed
🔗
Shareable LinksContribute from any device, anywhere

Employees Shouldn't Need Another Platform to Stay Recognized

Adoption of any new workplace tool depends on how seamlessly it fits into existing workflows. If recognition requires switching contexts, it won't happen consistently.

Connections embed WorkKudo directly into the platforms employees already use every day — reducing friction, increasing adoption, and making recognition feel natural rather than forced.

1New platforms create adoption friction that limits participation
2Employees won't check a separate app for recognition
3Disconnected tools mean missed milestones and manual effort
4Employee data stays siloed across different platforms
🔗 WorkKudo Connections
�Notion

Recognition Inside Your Workspace

"The board appeared right inside our Notion page. The team loved it — no extra tool, no extra step. Just celebration where we work."

Lena FischerHead of Engineering
📧Email

Delivered to Every Inbox

"Even colleagues without a WorkKudo account received the board beautifully formatted in their email. Zero friction."

James AdeyemiPeople Ops Lead
🔗Link

Contributed From Anywhere

"I shared the link in our Slack channel and 18 people added messages within the hour. No sign-ups, no barriers."

Priya NairTeam Lead

Bring Recognition Into Your Existing Workplace Ecosystem

Connections integrate WorkKudo with the platforms and systems your organization already depends on.

1 / 6
📝

Notion Integration

Connect WorkKudo to Notion to surface recognition boards inside your team workspace, keeping celebrations visible alongside your everyday work.

How It Works

01
🔌

Connect Your Tools

Set up the Notion integration or configure email delivery in just a few steps.

02
⚡

Recognition Flows In

Contribution invitations, reminders, and board links are delivered through your connected platforms.

03
🔗

Teams Participate

Employees contribute via shareable link or Notion — no platform switching or new accounts needed.

04
🎉

Celebrate Together

Completed recognition experiences are delivered through your connected channels and tools.

🔌

Connect Your Tools

Set up the Notion integration or configure email delivery in just a few steps.

Why It Matters

⚡

Easy Adoption

Recognition that lives inside existing tools gets used. No new platform means no adoption barrier.

🔗

Reduced Friction

Employees contribute to boards via shareable link or Notion — no extra logins or platform switching needed.

🤝

Better Participation

Meeting employees where they work dramatically increases contribution rates and recognition frequency.

🌊

Seamless Workflows

Automated triggers and notifications keep recognition moving without requiring manual effort from HR.

⏱️

Time Savings

Simple integrations and automated reminders eliminate manual tracking and ensure no celebration is ever missed.

🏗️

Future-Proof

API access means WorkKudo can connect with any platform you adopt in the future.

Connections — FAQs

How WorkKudo integrates with your existing workplace tools.

Make Recognition Part of How Your Team Already Works

Connect WorkKudo to Notion and reach your team via email or shareable link — so recognition happens naturally, consistently, and without friction.
